content: Success toasts are required for explicit user actions whose result isn't immediately visible (form closes, state resets). Failures always get toasts. Successes that have clear visual feedback (feature drawn on map) do NOT need toasts. Use toastStore.success() from $lib/components/ui/Toast.svelte.

title: shadow walk 45/46 remediated
rationale: Bulk remediation driven by frontend audit. Verified each finding against current code before fixing — many had been addressed incrementally in prior sessions without updating STATE.md.
